items.title: Time Tracking Formula rounds to quarter hour
items.excerpt:
ROUND({Time Tracking#Hours}*4,0)/4 
The above formula is different than the other post in that this one rounds to the nearest quarter hour, as opposed to “rounding up” to the quarter hour.
